name: StartPos Buddy
description: Link levels with their StartPos versions and hot-swap between them with a keybind.

switch.name: Switch Level Version
switch.description: Swap between the current level and its linked StartPos version while playing.

add-startpos.name: Add StartPos Here
add-startpos.description: Add a StartPos at your current position to a linked local copy of the level (best used in practice mode).

replace-existing.name: Replace Existing StartPos
replace-existing.description: When adding a StartPos, remove previous StartPos objects instead of keeping them (i.e. 'move' the StartPos instead of adding another).
